name: pnp-copilot-pro-dev-da-employee-onboarding-agent
title: Employee Onboarding Buddy using TypeSpec for Microsoft 365 Copilot
shortDescription: A declarative agent that orchestrates the full employee onboarding and offboarding lifecycle via Microsoft Graph — creating accounts, assigning licenses, managing groups, building Planner task boards, and sending welcome emails.
longDescription: This sample demonstrates how to build a declarative agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot using TypeSpec. The agent uses Microsoft Graph API to automate the employee onboarding workflow end-to-end: creating Entra ID user accounts, assigning Microsoft 365 licenses, adding users to department groups and Teams, generating a Planner onboarding task board for managers, and sending personalised welcome emails. It also supports offboarding by disabling accounts, revoking licenses, and removing group memberships.

thumbnails.alt: Employee Onboarding Buddy creating a new user account in Microsoft 365 Copilot

references.name: Build declarative agents with TypeSpec for Microsoft 365 Copilot
